{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hichino Shrine (Q135039296)
| native_name = 火地神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Hichino Shrine'''|火地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11378973|ltq=Q11378973|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}
** Series ordinal: 79
** P155: {{ill|Q135039295|ltq=Q135039295|qid=Q135039295|1=Ihatano Shrine (Q135039295)}}
** P156: {{ill|Sakikurusuno Shrine co-EnShrinement|lt=Sakikurusuno Shrine co-EnShrinement|qid=Q135039297|1=Sakikurusuno Shrine co-EnShrinement}}
